zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱，等待支撑确认
zh.content:
SOL/USD现报70.06，较前日回落1.24%，价格已低于20日均线72.49，短线结构偏弱。近24小时高低点仅在70.99至69.6间波动，说明市场进入窄幅震荡，但空方仍略占优势，反弹延续性不足。

MACD为-0.6689且位于零轴下方，动能偏空，显示下行压力尚未完全释放。RSI虽暂无数据，但结合价格跌破均线与反弹受限的表现，当前更像是弱势整理阶段，趋势修复前不宜过度乐观。

下方首要支撑关注69.60一线，若失守，可能进一步回测68.50附近区域；上方阻力先看72.49的20日均线，其次是70.99与73.50附近。只有放量站稳阻力带，才有望重新打开反弹空间。

操作上建议以区间思路为主，激进者可在69.6上方确认企稳后轻仓试多，并严格设置止损；若价格重新收复72.49且MACD拐头向上，再考虑顺势跟进。当前不宜追涨，更适合等待确认信号。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a short-term corrective phase, with price at 70.06 and down 1.24% on the day. The market remains slightly pressured after failing to hold above the 20-period simple moving average at 72.49, which now acts as an overhead barrier. The intraday range between 69.60 and 70.99 suggests consolidation near the lower half of the recent range rather than a clear bullish breakout.

Momentum indicators lean cautious. The MACD reading of -0.6689 indicates bearish momentum is still present, even without a signal line to confirm the crossover. RSI is unavailable, so momentum strength cannot be fully gauged, but price action alone suggests buyers have not yet regained control. A sustained move back above the SMA(20) would be the first sign of improving trend structure and could attract momentum traders.

Immediate support appears near 69.60, which matches the recent low and is the first level bulls need to defend. Below that, the market could open room toward the high-68s, where buyers may attempt to stabilize price. On the upside, 70.99 is the first resistance, followed by 72.49, then the mid-74 area if bullish follow-through develops. Reclaiming the 20-day average would materially improve the short-term outlook.

For traders, the setup favors patience over chasing. Aggressive buyers may look for a bounce only if price holds above 69.60 with improving intraday momentum. More conservative traders may prefer confirmation above 72.49 before considering long exposure, since that would suggest the recent weakness is fading. Until then, short-term rallies may face selling pressure, making disciplined stops and smaller position sizing important.
